PushEvent:yasyf/captain-hook.summary: added model-routing guard hooks (general/models pack) with ToolInput and WorkflowScript conditions

PushEvent:yasyf/cc-factory.summary: swapped the max-effort rule for a model routing table

PushEvent:yasyf/cc-interact.summary: replaced dispatch hardcoding with a per-op scope policy and narrowed subject resolution to a window's own review

PushEvent:yasyf/cc-review.summary: added a review lifecycle: expire idle reviews after 24h, close-without-submitting, and close/list repair commands

PushEvent:yasyf/fusekit.summary: built a tart VM harness for kernel-panic repro, added prefix-aware overlay skips and a writable fully-remote tree mode

PushEvent:yasyf/homebrew-tap.summary: added a shared Swift CLI release pipeline (release-swift.yml, swift-v1) and rolled the synckitd and cc-review casks

PushEvent:yasyf/reposync.summary: hardened the vcs layer with typed command errors, structural divergence classification, and a shared vcstest fixture

PushEvent:yasyf/semisweet.summary: unified CI onto current action majors (Node-24) and swapped the max-effort rule for a model routing table

PushEvent:yasyf/spawnllm.summary: delegated the build to the shared release-pypi-build.yml@pypi-v1 caller while keeping OIDC publish in-repo

PushEvent:yasyf/synckit.summary: added a busy gate that defers watches, with skipped-busy counts wired through the sync service and daemon

PushEvent:yasyf/yclaw.summary: swapped the max-effort rule for a model routing table
